# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying a microservices stack

dependencies:
  - name: common-library
    version: "1.0.0"
    repository: "https://example.com/charts"

templates:
  deployment.yaml:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    metadata:
      name: {{ .Release.Name }}-service
      labels:
        app: microservices
    spec:
      replicas: 3
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: microservices
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: microservices
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
            image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
            ports:
            - containerPort: 80

values.yaml:
  image:
    repository: myregistry/myservice
    tag: latest
